NAVAREA XIX 114/25
 1. GNSS/GPS JAMMING WILL TAKE PLACE ON THE COAST OF VESTERAALEN AND IN THE ADJACENT AREA IN THE NORWEGIAN SEA. PERIOD 11 TO 19 SEP 2025, MAIN ACTIVITY WITHIN 06:00 TO 16:00 UTC
  
 2. BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
  
 A. 70-00.00N 013-24.00E
 B. 70-00.00N 016-30.00E
 C. 69-15.00N 016-30.00E
 D. 68-42.00N 013-24.00E
 E. 70-00.00N 013-24.00E

  
 3. REFFERS TO NOTICE TO MARINERS/EFS 16-2025 (HTTPS://WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS)
